body_transformation: Chansey's rounded plump body now appears as a semi-translucent violet-hued form with faint internal energy currents visible beneath its surface, while its pale cream and pink coloration has shifted to a deep violet with ethereal silver highlights along the edges. The stubby legs retain their quadruped stance but now glow with a soft crimson mist at the joints, and the pointed rabbit ears are now hollowed out with swirling mist filling their interiors, their inner pink lining replaced by ghostly white. The curled spiral tail tip dissolves into wispy shadowy vapour that trails behind it, and the small rounded head maintains its shape but now features hollow eye sockets filled with swirling crimson mist. Subtle energy ripples distort the air around its low plump stance, enhancing its spectral presence without altering its core silhouette.
signature_feature: Tail tip: dissolving shadowy vapour trailing ghostly silver mist.
